description:
You are preparing a GPS unit for an NGO supply vehicle deployment in Afghanistan. The GPS was last used by someone for personal driving and has the wrong configuration.

Create a new vehicle profile named "Supply Vehicle" with fuel type Diesel, production year 2020, emission standard Euro6, and maximum speed 80 km/h. Set it as the active vehicle profile.

Fix the routing preferences: set route calculation to Shortest, allow unpaved roads (needed for field access to delivery sites), avoid ferries, and enable Arrive in driving direction.

Plan a multi-stop supply delivery route from Kabul, with an intermediate stop in Jalalabad, and final destination Kandahar. Add a gas station as a waypoint along the route using the "On Route" filter.

injected_errors.vehicle_name: Personal Sedan instead of Supply Vehicle
